suite.name: Jsonplaceholder Tests

test.name: TC-301 | GET /posts Returns 100 Posts With Correct Schema

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts path_url=/posts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${body} = [{'userId': 1, 'id': 1, 'title': 'sunt aut facere repellat provident occaecati excepturi optio reprehenderit', 'body': 'quia et suscipit\nsuscipit recusandae consequuntur expedita et cum\nreprehenderi...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

test.doc: GET all posts must return 200 with 100 items and correct schema keys.

test.name: TC-303 | POST /posts Creates A New Resource

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts path_url=/posts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '84', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"title": "Robot Framework API Test", "body": "Automated by YinYinMon", "userId": 1}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

test.doc: POST a new post must return 201 and the created object with an id.

suite.doc: REST API test suite using JSONPlaceholder as the target API. Covers GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, 404 handling, and response time. Uses keyword-driven and data-driven approaches.

suite.name: Login Tests

kw.name: Open Browser To SauceDemo
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Page Load Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the page load timeout value used by Selenium.
Opens Chrome maximized at 67% zoom and bypasses all password popup vectors.

test.name: TC-001 | Valid Login Redirects To Products Page

kw.name: Navigate To Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Navigates directly to the SauceDemo login page.

kw.name: Submit Login
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Fills in credentials and clicks login.

kw.name: Verify On Products Page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
Asserts URL contains /inventory.html and title is "Products".

test.doc: Standard user should land on the Products page after login.

test.name: TC-006 | User Can Logout And Return To Login Page

kw.name: Navigate To Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Navigates directly to the SauceDemo login page.

kw.name: Submit Login
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Fills in credentials and clicks login.

kw.name: Logout
Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ESCAPE to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ESCAPE to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Clears any stubborn Chrome password alerts using Escape, then logs out smoothly via the sidebar.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: Logged-in user must be able to logout via the burger menu.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Safe to run at suite level now because the test-status logic is separated.

suite.doc: Authentication test suite for SauceDemo. Covers valid login, invalid credentials, locked users, empty fields, logout, and page title validation.

Login As
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs into SauceDemo with the provided username and password.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Logs in with the standard valid user.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: TC-201 | Complete End-To-End Checkout Successfully

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart
Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the "Add to cart" button for a product matching the given name.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: Proceed To Checkout
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Ensures the checkout button is interactable before clicking.

kw.name: Fill Shipping Information
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Fills in the shipping form and clicks Continue.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Complete Order
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Clicks Finish and asserts order completion.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

test.doc: Full happy path: add item → cart → shipping info → order complete.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Safe to run at suite level now because the test-status logic is separated.

suite.doc: Checkout flow test suite for SauceDemo. Covers end-to-end purchase, cart removal, and validation errors.

test.name: TC-101 | Inventory Page Displays 6 Products

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Products Count Should Be
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.
Asserts the total number of product cards displayed.

test.doc: The product listing page must show exactly 6 inventory items.

test.name: TC-105 | Add Single Item To Cart Increments Badge To 1

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart
Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the "Add to cart" button for a product matching the given name.

kw.name: Cart Badge Should Show
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Asserts the cart badge number equals the expected count.

test.doc: Adding one product must show badge count of 1.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Safe to run at suite level now because the test-status logic is separated.

suite.doc: Product listing and inventory test suite for SauceDemo. Covers product count, sorting, cart operations, and product detail.
